HEXTECH_RUNES_SUBCATEGORY: [gold]Hextech:[/gold] Custom relics from the Hextech rune pool.
HEXTECH_FORGES_SUBCATEGORY: [gold]Stat Forgers:[/gold] Custom relics from the stat forging system.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.IRONCLAD: [gold]Ironclad Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Ironclad.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.SILENT: [gold]Silent Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Silent.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.REGENT: [gold]Regent Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Regent.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.DEFECT: [gold]Defect Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Defect.
HEXTECH_CHARACTER.NECROBINDER: [gold]Necrobinder Hexes:[/gold] Hextech runes only available to Necrobinder.
HEXTECH_WAITING_FOR_PLAYERS: Waiting for other players to choose...
HEXTECH_CONFIG_BUTTON_TOOLTIP: Choose which player Hextech runes can appear for you in solo and multiplayer runs.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_COUNT_DESCRIPTION: Each number is how many enemy hexes enemies gain in that act. Solo runs use your local config. In multiplayer, the host's config is locked in when the run starts. Changes take effect from the next run.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_COUNT_CLIENT_READONLY: This multiplayer run uses the host's per-act enemy hex gains from run start. Your local changes will only apply when you host or play solo next run.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_DESCRIPTION: Click a relic icon to enable or disable it; touch and hold to inspect it. Disabled player Hextech runes will not appear in your rune choices. In multiplayer, each player filters their own refresh pool with their own config.
HEXTECH_CONFIG_SUMMARY: {0}/{1} selectable player Hextech runes are currently enabled.
HEXTECH_ENEMY_REMOVED_DESCRIPTION: No new enemy hex will be added for this act.
